basic_details.job_title: Swami Atmanand Schools Assistant Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Swami Atmanand Schools Assistant Teacher Notification 2026 has been released on 29 May 2026 on the official website www.kondagaon.gov.in. A total of 13 vacancies have been announced through the Swami Atmanand Schools Assistant Teacher Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer): 5 years; Women: 10 years; PWD: as per GAD guidelines; Chhattisgarh residents: additional 5 years (max age 40 years)

qualification.education_qualification: Higher Secondary (12th) with minimum 45% marks in English medium, D.Ed/D.El.Ed/B.El.Ed, TET Primary Level passed
qualification.details: Assistant Teacher - Makdi School, Keshkal School, Farsgaon School, Mahatma Gandhi Ward School, Jamkotpara Kondagaon School, Lanjoda School, Konagud School, Vishrampuri School, Bansakot School: Higher Secondary Examination or D.Ed/D.El.Ed/B.El.Ed with minimum 45% marks from any recognized board in English medium. TET Primary level passed mandatory. All education in English medium. Assistant Teacher Science Laboratory - Vishrampuri School: Higher Secondary Examination with minimum 50% marks in Biology/Physics/Chemistry from any recognized board in English medium.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Teacher - Mahatma Gandhi Ward School
Assistant Teacher Science Laboratory - Vishrampuri School

salary_details.details: Assistant Teacher posts: Rs. 25300/- Per Month Assistant Teacher Science Laboratory post: Rs. 22400/- Per Month

selection_process: Merit List based on educational qualification marks (10th 40%
12th 60%) Document Verification Open Counseling for posting
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Swami Atmanand Schools Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.kondagaon.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Swami Atmanand Schools Assistant Teacher posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Swami Atmanand Schools Assistant Teacher recruitment is 12th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Teacher posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have passed Higher Secondary (12th) with at least 45% marks in English medium, along with D.Ed/D.El.Ed/B.El.Ed and TET Primary Level qualification. All education must be in English medium.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Teacher position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 13 vacancies for the Assistant Teacher posts across various schools under Swami Atmanand Schools.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Teacher posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Assistant Teacher posts ranges from Rs. 22400/- to Rs. 25300/- per month, depending on the specific post and school.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Swami Atmanand Schools Assistant Teacher recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on a merit list derived from educational qualification marks, followed by document verification and open counseling for posting.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Which district is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for Swami Atmanand Schools located in Kondagaon, Chhattisgarh.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Swami Atmanand Schools, which is www.kondagaon.gov.in.
